on_screen_text:
Riya ek baat bolu [Riya, can I tell you something?]
English samjh toh aati hai, lekin bolni nahi aati hai [I understand English, but can't speak it]
Iss wajah se personal life mein ladkiyan bhav nahi deti [Because of this, girls don't pay attention to me in my personal life]
Aur office mein boss bhi promotion nahi deta [And the boss doesn't promote me at the office either]
Har taraf se band baji padi hai [I'm stuck from all sides]
Sochta hoon...bachpan mein english nahi Sikhi toh ab toh koi chance hi nahi hai [I think... since I didn't learn English in childhood, there's no chance now]
Riya: Arey amit, aisa bilkul bhi nahi hai [Oh Amit, that's not true at all]
Riya: Tu abhi bhi english fluently bol sakta hai [You can still speak English fluently]
Riya: Aur woh bhi simple treeke se...sirf roz mujhse thodi der chat karke... [And that too in a simple way... just by chatting with me for a bit every day...]
Riya: Main Teri dost bhi hu aur coach bhi [I am your friend as well as your coach]
Riya: Aur yahaan koi judgement nahi...galti karega toh sirf sahi karvaungi [And there's no judgment here... if you make a mistake, I'll just correct it]
Amit: Sach?? [Really??]
Amit: Matalab bachpan ke alawa ab iss umar mein bhi ab mein english sikh sakta hoon [Meaning, apart from childhood, I can learn English at this age too?]
Amit: Woh bhi confidence ke sath bol sakta hoon?? [And speak it with confidence too??]
Riya: Bilkul! [Absolutely!]
Riya: Tu sirf english nahi seekhega, Amit... [You won't just learn English, Amit...]
Riya: Tu izzat aur confidence kamayega jo paisa bhi nahi dila sakta [You will earn respect and confidence that money can't buy]
Riya: Aur sirf 15 din mein Teri personality aisi chamkegi ki log samne se salaam karenge [And in just 15 days, your personality will shine so much that people will salute you]
Amit: Woww.. [Wow..]
Amit: Riya you are the best
Amit: Tumne toh meri problem hi solve kardi [You solved my problem]
Amit: Chalo time waste nahi karte hai [Let's not waste time]
Amit: Aaj se hi english Sikhna shuru karte hai [Let's start learning English from today]
Great! Download My Sivi. I'll see you there
summary: A simulated WhatsApp conversation shows a user named Amit expressing frustration over understanding English but being unable to speak it, which affects his personal and professional life. His AI chat companion, Riya, reassures him that he can learn fluent English through daily judgment-free chatting. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the 'My Sivi' app.
